An '''engagement''' occurred in the [[Yuvern system/Legends|Yuvern system]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==The battle==
[[Cane Adiss/Legends|Cane Adiss]] was assigned by [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] to transport [[Spice/Legends|spice]] to [[Yuvern/Legends|Yuvern]]. Little did he know that the entire [[Oplovis Sector Fleet]] was currently stationed in the system. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces boarded his ship for inspection. While inspecting Adiss' ship, the Imperial fleet came under attack by a line of battle from the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Fleet]].<ref name="DB">{{DB|character|caneadiss|Adiss, Cane}}</ref> The attack forced the Empire to retreat to the fleet's base of operations on [[Harrod's Planet]].<ref name="RASB" /> Adiss agreed to monitor for any Alliance activity before leaving Harrod's Planet.<ref name="DB" />

==Aftermath==
Two months after the Imperial defeat at Yuvern, [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] visited the [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] in charge of Oplovis Fleet and executed him for his failure, placing a new admiral in charge. After six months of settling into his new position, this admiral began requisitioning supplies for an attack on Rebel forces in [[Atrivis sector/Legends|Atrivis sector]]. Unfortunately for Oplovis Fleet, [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]] was able to discern this, and this led to a second [[Battle of the Generis system|defeat]] of the fleet eight months after the Battle of Yuvern, in the [[Generis system/Legends|Atrivis system]].<ref name="RASB" />
